catalog_content:
Item Name: Gumball Dreams Classic Gumball Machine/Candy Dispenser, 15 Inch - Bubble Gum Pink
Bullet Point 1: Gumball machine only, gumballs and candy not included
Bullet Point 2: Real glass gumball machine globe
Bullet Point 3: Cast metal gumball machine base, lid, and coin mechanism
Bullet Point 4: Accepts any coins (quarters, dimes, nickels, pennies)
Bullet Point 5: Dispenses small gumballs (.62" or smaller), candy, or nuts
Product Description: Elevate any occasion, from color-themed parties to home and kitchen decor, apartment living, or dorm room aesthetics, with the timeless charm of our Gumball Dreams Classic Gumball Machine. This delightful piece seamlessly blends nostalgia with modern design, making it a must-have for those who appreciate both style and a touch of whimsy. Key Features: 1. Premium Craftsmanship: Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this classic gumball machine boasts a real glass gumball globe paired with a sturdy cast metal base, lid, and coin mechanism. The proprietary enameled metal base and lid not only add to its durability but also prevent unsightly scratches and chips. 2. Coin-Friendly: Our Gumball Dreams Classic Gumball Machine is designed to accommodate a wide range of coins, including quarters, dimes, nickels, pennies, and most coins from around the world. This feature ensures that anyone can enjoy the sweet rewards it offers. 3. Versatile Dispensing: Delight in the anticipation as it dispenses small gumballs (0.62" or smaller), candy, or nuts. Whether you have a penchant for traditional gumballs or a sweet tooth craving, this machine has you covered. 4. Size Options: Choose from three convenient sizes to suit your space and preferences. Opt for the compact 9-inch machine for a subtle touch, the 12-inch medium size for a balanced presence, or the grand 15-inch machine, which can be elevated with an optional stand for a total height of 37". 5. Free Play Option: For added convenience, the coin mechanism can be easily set to "free play," allowing candy to dispense without the need for coins. Perfect for households with kids or those who love to share the joy of candy without limits. Capacity: * Small 9-inch machine: Approximately 1 lb of 1/2-inch gumballs. * Medium 12-inch machine: Approximately 2 lbs of 1/2-inch gumballs. * Large 15-inch machine: Approximately 4 lbs of 1/2-inch gumballs. Optional Matching Stand: Elevate your gumball machine's style with our matching black stand, ensuring it becomes a standout piece in any setting. Please note that candy and gumballs are sold separately, allowing you to customize your gumball experience to your heart's content. Add a touch of nostalgia and sweetness to your life with our Gumball Dreams Classic Gumball Machine. It's not just a candy dispenser; it's a conversation starter, a décor statement, and a cherished addition to any space. Get yours today and indulge in the simple joys of life, one gumball at a time.
Value: 1.0
Unit: Count
overall_summary: Premium, nostalgic decor piece with a high-quality, vintage-inspired design. The 15-inch size and premium materials (real glass, cast metal) justify a higher price point compared to standard plastic candy dispensers. Positioned as a stylish, conversation-starting home accessory rather than a functional edible product, appealing to collectors and decor enthusiasts. The optional stand and customizable candy options add to its luxury appeal.
